---
title: "Publications"
title-block-banner: true
page-layout: full
image: ../../assets/profile.jpg
number-sections: false
comments: false
include-in-header: 
            - text: |
                <style>
                h1, .title, .description {
                  font-family: "Zen Kurenaido", sans-serif !important;
                }
                </style>
listing: 
    -   id: citable-listing
        template: ../assets/publications.ejs
        sort: "date desc"
        contents:
            - "../publications/*/*.qmd"
---

::: {#citable-listing}
:::
